title: Myrcia melanophylla

Myrcia melanophylla belongs to the genus Myrcia, a group of shrubs and trees that are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The classification of Myrcia melanophylla reflects its evolutionary history and relationships to other plants within the Myrtaceae family.
